steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: Identify the cost components: a fixed \$18 service fee plus \$12 per hour for $t$ hours. Total cost = $18 + 12t$.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: The person intends to spend at most \$66, so the total cost must be less than or equal to 66: $$18 + 12t \leq 66$$

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content:
Evaluate each choice:
  • A: $12t \leq 66$ — Omits the fixed \$18 service fee entirely. Eliminated.
  • B: $12 + 18t \leq 66$ — Swaps the service fee and hourly rate (\$12 fixed, \$18/hr), contradicting the problem. Eliminated.
  • C: $18t \leq 66$ — Uses only the service fee amount as the hourly rate and drops the fixed fee structure. Eliminated.
  • D: $18 + 12t \leq 66$ — Correctly reflects the \$18 fixed fee plus \$12 per hour not exceeding \$66. That is the correct answer.
